summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five open PRs. No merge recommendation is safe because the artifact lacks complete merge preflight proof, especially Codex /review and hydrated human/bot comment resolution. Two PRs also have failing Real behavior proof checks and waiting-on-author labels, and one has conflicts plus broad XL memory changes.

actions.reason: Likely close to mergeable, but merge_candidate is blocked by missing required merge preflight proof: current mergeability, hydrated comment/bot comment resolution, and passed Codex /review.

Not mergeable from this plan. Human follow-up is needed because the PR is explicitly waiting on author and has a failing Real behavior proof check.
Blocked by broad XL code delta, conflicts, waiting-on-author state, and failing Real behavior proof. No narrow maintainer-safe repair path is concrete from the hydrated artifact.
Potentially repairable or mergeable after author/preflight resolution, but this plan cannot recommend merge without current mergeability, hydrated comments/bot comments, and passed Codex /review.
